summary: Classified the five hydrated open PRs independently as a live inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected, no close/merge/fix actions are recommended. Four PRs remain independent on their normal review paths, and #87627 is routed out of ProjectClownfish because deterministic validation requires security-sensitive handling for that exact PR.

actions.reason: Independent, focused health-output PR that should remain open for proof/review; no safe close action is available and merge/fix are blocked by job policy.
Independent bug-fix PR with useful code and unresolved proof gate; keep open rather than close or escalate the whole cluster.
Validator-required security-sensitive handling makes this PR out of scope for ProjectClownfish cleanup; route the exact PR to central OpenClaw security handling.
Maintainer-owned draft PR should remain on the maintainer review path; no cleanup mutation is appropriate.
Independent ready-for-maintainer PR with supplied proof; merge is blocked by job policy, so keep it open on the normal review path.

needs_human: #87627 must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling per deterministic validator; ProjectClownfish should not close, merge, label, comment on, or fix that PR.
